HomePage.meta_description: An AAC platform that helps people communicate using visual vocabulary, phrases, and accessible tools.
HomePage.hero_subtitle: Help non-speaking and minimally speaking people express needs, feelings, and ideas with calm, accessible AAC tools.
HomePage.hero_image_alt: Illustration showing a calm AAC communication board.
HomePage.whoHelps_description: Designed for families, therapists, schools, and AAC users across a wide range of needs.
HomePage.demo_description: Tap symbols to build a phrase, then turn it into spoken communication.
HomePage.accessibility_description: Large touch targets, keyboard support, high contrast, screen-reader support, and low cognitive load by design.
HomePage.finalCta_title: Every voice deserves to be heard.
HomePage.finalCta_description: Explore plans, request a demo, or start building vocabulary today.

FeaturesPage.meta_description: Explore AAC features designed for clarity, customization, and accessibility.
FeaturesPage.image_alt: Illustration representing AAC features and vocabulary.
FeaturesPage.title: Features
FeaturesPage.subtitle: Build communication that fits the person, the setting, and the moment.
FeaturesPage.section_core_vocab_body: Prioritize high-frequency words that unlock meaningful communication across contexts.
FeaturesPage.section_fringe_vocab_body: Add personalized words for people, places, routines, and interests.
FeaturesPage.section_phrase_builder_body: Combine symbols into phrases with clear, predictable structure.
FeaturesPage.section_color_coding_body: Support language learning using consistent category colors.
FeaturesPage.section_therapist_tools_body: Manage vocabulary, support goals, and collaborate with families and schools.
FeaturesPage.section_sync_body: Keep boards and vocabulary available across devices and settings.

PricingPage.meta_description: Simple plans for families, therapists, and schools.
PricingPage.image_alt: Illustration representing pricing plans and options.
PricingPage.title: Pricing
PricingPage.subtitle: Choose a plan that matches your needs today, with room to grow later.
PricingPage.plan_free_body: Limited vocabulary and basic AAC boards for getting started.
PricingPage.plan_family_body: Unlimited phrases, personalization, and cloud sync for home use.
PricingPage.plan_therapist_body: Multiple users, vocabulary management, and reporting for therapy workflows.
PricingPage.plan_school_body: Classroom management, shared libraries, and student groups for schools.

TherapistsPage.meta_description: AAC tools and workflows designed for therapy settings and collaboration.
TherapistsPage.image_alt: Illustration representing therapy workflows and planning.
TherapistsPage.title: For therapists
TherapistsPage.subtitle: Support clients with accessible vocabulary, predictable routines, and simple collaboration.
TherapistsPage.section_workflows_body: Set up boards that match therapy goals and real-life contexts.
TherapistsPage.section_customization_body: Adjust categories, add targets, and tailor to individual needs and interests.
TherapistsPage.section_support_body: Use consistent structure to reduce cognitive load and support carryover.
TherapistsPage.section_printables_body: Create printable AAC boards for clinics, classrooms, and home.

AccessibilityPage.meta_description: Accessibility goals and design choices that support AAC users.
AccessibilityPage.image_alt: Illustration representing accessible design and assistive support.
AccessibilityPage.title: Accessibility
AccessibilityPage.subtitle: Designed for touch, keyboard, screen readers, and cognitive accessibility.
AccessibilityPage.item_touch_targets: Large touch targets and tablet-friendly layouts.
AccessibilityPage.item_contrast: Accessible color contrast and clear typography.
AccessibilityPage.item_cognitive: Low cognitive load: calm, predictable UI and minimal distractions.

FaqPage.meta_description: Answers to common questions about AAC and Loom Assist.
FaqPage.image_alt: Illustration representing frequently asked questions and guidance.
FaqPage.title: FAQ
FaqPage.subtitle: Quick answers for families, therapists, and schools.
FaqPage.q1_body: AAC (Augmentative and Alternative Communication) helps people communicate using tools like symbols, words, and voice output.
FaqPage.q2_body: Loom Assist supports AAC users, families, therapists, and schools who want an accessible way to build communication.
FaqPage.q3_body: Offline support depends on the device and plan. We aim to keep core communication available when connectivity is limited.
FaqPage.q4_body: Yes. You can add categories, personalize vocabulary, and tailor boards to the person and context.
FaqPage.q5_body: Many autistic AAC users benefit from visual vocabulary and predictable layouts. Loom Assist is designed with calm, accessible UI.
FaqPage.q6_body: Yes. School plans are designed for classroom workflows, shared libraries, and student groups.

ResourcesPage.meta_description: Guides and resources for AAC communication and therapy support.
ResourcesPage.image_alt: Illustration representing learning resources and guides.
ResourcesPage.title: Resources
ResourcesPage.subtitle: Practical help for AAC communication at home, in therapy, and at school.
ResourcesPage.card_faq_body: Common questions about AAC and getting started.
ResourcesPage.card_coming_soon_body: We’re building guides for core vocabulary, routines, and therapy carryover.

ContactPage.meta_description: Contact Loom Assist for support, demos, and partnerships.
ContactPage.image_alt: Illustration representing contact and support messages.
ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.subtitle: Tell us what you need and we’ll get you to the right place.

CounterForm.presentation: The counter is stored in the database and incremented by the value you provide.

About.meta_description: Learn why Loom Assist exists and what we believe about accessible communication.
About.image_alt: Illustration representing Loom Assist’s mission and values.
About.title: About Loom Assist
About.mission: Loom Assist exists to help people communicate with dignity, clarity, and confidence—at home, in therapy, and at school.
About.values_1: We design for low cognitive load and real-world routines.
About.values_2: We build with accessibility as a baseline, not an add-on.
About.values_3: We work toward inclusive communication for every person.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.
